name: in-sheeps-clothing-understanding-and-dealing-with-manipulative-people
description: Dr. George Simon's 'In Sheep's Clothing: Understanding and Dealing with Manipulative People' — the definitive guide to recognizing covert-aggressive manipulation. 13 tactics: guilt-tripping, shaming, gaslighting, playing victim, blaming. Covert-aggressive personality types. Assertiveness, boundaries, and reclaiming your power.
